message:
feat(conformance): add 59 tests for INFO, read-only variants, reverse zset ops

Coverage expansion for previously untested or under-tested commands:
- INFO: cluster/replication/cpu/clients/memory/modules/errorstats sections
- EVAL_RO/EVALSHA_RO: basic eval, KEYS/ARGV, wrong arity, NOSCRIPT
- FCALL_RO: basic call, keys+args, missing function, wrong arity
- SORT_RO: basic/DESC/LIMIT/ALPHA, STORE rejection, nonexistent, wrong arity
- ZREVRANGE: all/subset/WITHSCORES/nonexistent/out-of-bounds/wrong arity
- ZREVRANK: first/middle/last/nonexistent member+key/wrong arity
- ZREVRANGEBYSCORE: all/range/exclusive/LIMIT/WITHSCORES/nonexistent/wrong arity
- KEYS: no match/wrong arity/single pattern match

Conformance count: 3046 -> 3105

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 | RDB/AOF persistence | in_progress | AOF record frame contract implemented; Store→AOF rewrite serialization (all data types + TTL), atomic file I/O (write_aof_file/read_aof_file), Runtime::load_aof replay, SAVE/BGSAVE/BGREWRITEAOF wired to actual persistence; RDB snapshot format pending |
 | Replication baseline | in_progress | state/offset progression scaffolded; protocol sync semantics pending |
 | ACL/config mode split | in_progress | ACL command subsystem implemented (AUTH, ACL SETUSER/GETUSER/DELUSER/LIST/WHOAMI/CAT/GENPASS/LOG); CONFIG GET/SET implemented in fr-runtime with full glob pattern matching and multi-pattern support; full parameter surface pending |
-| Differential conformance harness | in_progress | fixture runner online for `core_strings`, `core_errors`, `core_hash`, `core_list`, `core_set`, `core_zset`, `core_geo`, `core_stream`, `core_generic`, `core_acl`, `core_hyperloglog`, `core_bitmap`, `core_transaction`, `core_connection`, `core_expiry`, `core_client`, `core_server`, `core_scripting`, `core_pubsub`, `core_replication`, `core_sort`, `core_scan`, `core_config`, `core_cluster`, `core_copy`, `core_function`, `core_wait`, `protocol_negative`, and `persist_replay` suites (3046 core conformance cases) |
+| Differential conformance harness | in_progress | fixture runner online for `core_strings`, `core_errors`, `core_hash`, `core_list`, `core_set`, `core_zset`, `core_geo`, `core_stream`, `core_generic`, `core_acl`, `core_hyperloglog`, `core_bitmap`, `core_transaction`, `core_connection`, `core_expiry`, `core_client`, `core_server`, `core_scripting`, `core_pubsub`, `core_replication`, `core_sort`, `core_scan`, `core_config`, `core_cluster`, `core_copy`, `core_function`, `core_wait`, `protocol_negative`, and `persist_replay` suites (3105 core conformance cases) |
